manifest.description: Connect Paperclip to ACN: sync tasks, manage agent identity, and settle work through the ACN protocol layer.
manifest.author: acnlabs

acnBaseUrl.title: ACN Base URL
acnBaseUrl.description: Base URL of the ACN instance (no trailing slash). Defaults to ACN Labs' hosted production ACN — point at your own deployment to self-host.

paperclipBaseUrl.title: Paperclip Base URL
paperclipBaseUrl.description: Public base URL of this Paperclip instance (e.g. https://app.paperclip.ai). Used to construct the ACN harness webhook URL.

acnApiKeyRef.title: ACN API Key (secret ref)
acnApiKeyRef.description: Secret reference to the ACN agent API key used to call ACN on behalf of Paperclip.

acnHarnessSecretRef.title: ACN Harness Webhook Secret (secret ref)
acnHarnessSecretRef.description: Secret reference to the shared HMAC-SHA256 secret used to sign and verify ACN harness webhook deliveries (X-ACN-Signature). Leave blank to skip verification (NOT recommended in production).

acnSubnetId.title: ACN Subnet ID
acnSubnetId.description: The ACN subnet whose tasks this plugin syncs into Paperclip issues.

autoCreateIssues.title: Auto-create Paperclip issues for new ACN tasks

autoApproveOnDone.title: Auto-approve ACN task when Paperclip issue moves to 'done'
autoApproveOnDone.description: When disabled, a board member must click Approve in the ACN tab to release payment.

webhooks.description: Receives HMAC-signed lifecycle events from ACN (task.created, task.submitted, task.completed, ...).
